evidence.snippet: 711-measured: ~+1 量感 bass shelf, relaxed treble vs Harman IE 2019
温暖耐听，声场中等偏上，结像清晰，解析中规中矩
single dynamic driver; successor tuning in the brand's warm line
THD < 0.5% at 94 dB SPL; no obvious driver breakup in the audible band

claims.text: Sub-bass slightly elevated (+1 量感) vs Harman IE 2019 on IEC711.
Mid-bass slightly elevated (+1 量感); warm foundation.
Upper-mids neutral (0 量感); vocals neither shouty nor recessed.
Lower-treble slightly lacking (-1 量感); low sibilance risk.
Mid-treble slightly lacking (-1 量感); relaxed detail edge.
Air slightly lacking (-1 量感); modest top-end sparkle.
Overall signature is warm (elevated bass + relaxed treble), measured on IEC711 vs Harman IE 2019.

claims.dissent: one erji poster calls it merely average; tier-3 impression-led, warm-lean bias-corrected

claims.text: Resolution is average for its tier.
Timbre is natural, helped by the relaxed treble.
Single dynamic driver; part of the brand's warm-tuned line (lineage prior).
Distortion is low (THD < 0.5% at 94 dB SPL); no obvious driver stress in the audible band.

gaps: Technicalities rest on a single tier-3 impression-led source; soundstage rating is contested.
No cross-measurer FR to bound unit/rig variance.
